name: skill-marketplace
description: Discovery site for Claude Code community skills

scripts.build: node esbuild.config.mjs && npx tailwindcss -i src/styles/main.css -o dist/styles.css --minify && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r public dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r public dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && npx concurrently "esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --sourcemap --watch" "tailwindcss -i src/styles/main.css -o dist/styles.css --watch" "npx serve dist -p 3000"
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx serve dist -p 3000
